creator: list1@gjunka.com
text:
Fails to build when HELP is unset:

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for kf5-extra-cmake-modules-5.32.0_2
_OPTIONS_READ=kf5-extra-cmake-modules-5.32.0_2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS HELP MANPAGES TEST
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=HELP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MANPAGES

Build log:

(...)
-- Installing: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/extra-cmake-modules/html/manual/ecm.7.html
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for kf5-extra-cmake-modules-5.58.0
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/extra-cmake-modules/ExtraCMakeModules.qch:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/kf5-extra-cmake-modules

Could be related to bug #218462
